signals.content_en: MOFCOM announced a preliminary affirmative determination in an anti-dumping investigation covering interface ICs and gate driver ICs under HS headings 8542 and 8541. Exporters should review country-specific duties when shipping to China.
signals.content_zh: 中国商务部公布了对原产于美国的某些模拟集成电路反倾销调查的初步肯定性裁定，涉及HS编码8542和8541下的接口IC和栅极驱动IC。出口商在向中国发货时应审查国别关税。

signals.content_en: EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) reporting obligations may affect exports of electronics enclosures and heat sinks containing aluminum above threshold levels.
signals.content_zh: 欧盟碳边境调节机制（CBAM）报告义务可能影响含铝量超过阈值的电子外壳和散热器的出口。

signals.content_en: Applied Materials to Pay $252 Million Penalty to BIS for Illegally Exporting Semiconductor Manufacturing Equipment
signals.content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法出口半导体制造设备向美国工业安全局支付2.52亿美元罚款

signals.content_en: Department of Commerce Revises License Review Policy for Semiconductors Exported to China
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部修订对华出口半导体许可证审查政策

signals.content_en: Department of Commerce rescinds Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部撤销拜登时期的枪支规定，恢复对民用枪支出口管制的常识性做法。

signals.content_en: Department of Commerce Expands Entity List to Cover Affiliates of Listed Entities
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部扩大实体清单，涵盖被列实体的关联公司

signals.content_en: Department of Commerce Closes Export Controls Loophole for Foreign-Owned Semiconductor Fabs in China
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部关闭外国在华半导体工厂的出口管制漏洞

signals.content_en: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部放宽对叙利亚的出口管制
